sentences.text: This is why "AI will replace copywriters" gets it backward.
The copywriters winning right now use AI to produce 10× the drafts while owning the strategy layer — audience insight, angles, judgment — that clients actually pay for.
💡 The director's mindsetStop thinking of AI as a writer you compete with.
Think of it as a fast, tireless junior writer you direct.
Directors who give sharp briefs get sharp work — from humans and machines alike.
